positioning: doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system; structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
appetite regulation + eating behavior correction + digestion/gut-comfort support system
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when protocol is followed
supports weight-loss efforts by making adherence easier
eligibility: users with cravings, inconsistency, emotional eating, low energy, or slow progress
PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS (not a cure claim)
protocol_morning: zero-calorie drinks allowed (tea, coffee, lemon water)
protocol_night: OK Powder + Tablet ~15 minutes before bed
typically after dinner gap with 2-hour gap before bedtime
fasting_rules: 4-hour no-solid-food window after OK Liquid in morning
eat only when true hunger is felt
mechanism_allowed_claims: helps you feel full for longer
can support more stable daily energy
can make a simpler routine easier to follow
